---
draft: false
title: Kevin Ushey
subtitle: Software Engineer
date: '2026-03-17'
about:
  template: marquee
  image: featured.jpg
  links:
  - icon: link
    text: Posit
    href: https://posit.co
  - icon: house
    href: https://kevinushey.github.io/
  - icon: video
    text: Package Management
    href: ../recordings/package_management
  - icon: linkedin
    href: http://www.linkedin.com/pub/kevin-ushey/42/355/33a
  - icon: bluesky
    href: https://bsky.app/profile/kevinushey.bsky.social
  - icon: mastodon
    href: https://fosstodon.org/@kevinushey
  - icon: github
    href: https://github.com/kevinushey
---

Kevin Ushey is a software engineer at Posit, and previously worked as as a statistical programmer at the rglab within the Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center. Kevin is a tool builder -- he enjoys developing computational tools that help researchers and scientists to achieve their analytic goals.

Kevin completed his MSc in Statistics at the University of British Columbia, under the supervision of Jenny Bryan. His thesis involved the study of gene-gene and gene-Rx interaction effects, and statistical assessment of these epistatic effects in yeast growth curves.
